questionHtml: Starting at A, use the nearest neighbour algorithm to find an upper bound for the length of the journey the inspector must take. State the order in which the towns are to be visited.
markschemeHtml:
AEDCFBA          A1A1

 

Note: Award A1 for AE at start, A1 for correct completed route.

 

attempt to find the length of their route

length 22+21+19+24+25+31          (M1)

=142 km          A1

 

Note: Award A1A0M1A0 for omitted final edge and their sum.

[4 marks]
